---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement to the schema, process, or tooling
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternatives? Why is this approach preferred?

## Impact

Which parts of the framework would be affected?

- [ ] JSON Schema (`schemas/adr.schema.json`)
- [ ] Process documentation (`docs/adr-process.md`)
- [ ] Validator script (`scripts/validate-adr.py`)
- [ ] ADR template (`.skills/adr-author/assets/adr-template.yaml`)
- [ ] Example ADRs (`examples-reference/`)
- [ ] CI workflow (`.github/workflows/`)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Any references, links to other ADR frameworks, or examples that inspired this request.
